description.unified: Deals Magic DMG to an enemy and recovers HP equal to 25% of the damage dealt. Increases own ATK by 4% for 15sec. This ATK increase effect stacks up to 6 times.
Moves to the rearmost enemy and deals Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies. Increases Magic DMG taken by [30%->20%] and reduces Status Resistance by 320 for [10 sec -> 5sec].
Deals Magic DMG to enemies within range 4 times. While casting, the caster is immune to status effects and all damage taken is reduced by 60%.

Upon killing an enemy, reduces the Cooldown of all skills by 30% and gains [Harvest] stacks 1. [Harvest]: Increases ATK by [???->80*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))], stacking up to [ (added) 10] times. [(removed) for 12 sec]

IV.unified: When [Harvest] is triggered, restores [1 orb of mana->1000 of your Mana].

dark.unified: Cooldown is reduced by 2 sec. [(removed) Ignores enemy Block.]

light.unified: Damage increases by 50%. [(removed) Mana cost is reduced by 1.]

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by [1->2000], but after using a skill, if there are nearby enemies, additionally uses [Absorbing Blow].

light.unified: Damage is reduced by 30%, but the number of hits is doubled. [(removed) DMG is increased by 40%.]

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by 1000, but triggers [Harvest] once. [(removed) DMG taken is reduced by 50% while skill is in use.]

light.unified: Mana recovery per second increases by [50%->10%] per stack.

dark.unified: If stacks are 6 or more, cooldown is additionally reduced by 1 sec every second. [(removed) Mana is always at 100%]

description.unified: [Absorbing Blow] increases DMG by {0}% and resets its Cooldown upon killing an enemy. [(removed) ATK is increased by 20% for 10 sec, stacks 3 times]
[Devil's Prom] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases DMG by {0}%.

dark.unified: When attacking with a skill, increases Epis’s Attack by 4% and Armor Penetration by 4%. This effect stacks up to 5 times.

description.unified: On hit, has a 25% chance to deal additional Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power and increase your Attack by {1}%. The Attack increase stacks up to [10->5] times.
